_note: TensorRT 10.3 FP16 engine of densenet121-res224-all on Jetson Orin Nano Super (MAXN_SUPER). Throughput in images/sec. Accuracy vs PyTorch FP32: max 0.86 percentage-point diff on pathology probabilities. Measured via trtexec (batched) and src/trt_runner.py (concurrent).

int8._note: INT8 post-training quantization (entropy calibration on 512 ChestMNIST images), densenet-nih. Speed vs accuracy trade-off measured on 2000 labeled test images.
